negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_c4ddfd5b-a5dd-4a68-9f6a-1a4c07ef8a27
prompt: A man is maneuvering a large recliner armchair in a spacious room with beige carpeting. The camera pans right in a wide shot at eye level to capture his movements. The man is dressed in a light blue button-up shirt, baggy brown trousers, and dark brown shoes. His right profile is facing the camera. He begins by standing to the left of the dark maroon recliner and gripping its backrest and side, tilting it slightly upwards from its base. Its upholstery shines in the light, except for a tan wooden knob on the lower right half of the chair. In subsequent moments, he continues to carefully tip it forward, exposing the wooden framework and metal mechanism underneath. He maintains a steady grip as he adjusts his hands, with a screwdriver gripped in his right hand at the same time. As he carefully and deliberately rolls the recliner from upright, its position is altered from fully upright to horizontal. The man hunches over and inserts the screwdriver into the armchair frame, moving the screwdriver in and then upwards before moving his attention to the opposite side of the chair. The camera keeps its focus on the standing man, stopping its pan but shaking slightly as the man uses his screwdriver. The room is spacious and decorated with a few pieces of furniture including a striped armchair and a brown armchair, which are positioned against the walls across from each other. There is a white railing that is at the top left side of the frame, which stands next to an outcropped part of the wall. A small dark lamp on the left of the striped chair can be seen before the camera pans. Muted yellow walls with white baseboards form a corner on the right side of the frame. Behind the other brown armchair, there is a black framed picture hanging, which features indistinguishable warm hues. Two bronze-colored vases to the right of the scene rest under the frame in a wooden tray on a beige platform. A large potted plant with sparse foliage reaches past this frame.
